name: Bayerock Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>岩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ベアロック
desc: If a monster(s) you control or in your hand is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can target 1 other Dinosaur monster and/or 1 Rock monster in your GY; Special Summon them. You can only use each effect of "Bayerock Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a monster(s) you control or in your hand is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can target 1 other Dinosaur monster and/or 1 Rock monster in your GY; Special Summon them. You can only use each effect of "Bayerock Dragon" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
